requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Togo is a Francophone, IEC-aligned market, and any formal EV charging deployment for internationally sourced passenger EVs should expect IEC 62196 connectors: IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 for DC fast charging. No official Togo-specific mandatory EV connector regulation was confirmed from public sources as of 2026-06-14, reflecting the very early state of the EV market. However, project tenders, donor-funded transport projects, hotels, fleets, and imported European-standard EVs are likely to require IEC 62196 interoperability. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets.
summary.zh: 多哥是法语、IEC对齐市场，任何面向国际来源乘用电动汽车的正式充电部署，均应预期采用IEC 62196接口：交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 CCS2。截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开来源确认多哥专门强制性的电动汽车接口法规，这反映出电动汽车市场仍处于极早期阶段。但是，项目招标、捐助方资助交通项目、酒店、车队以及进口欧洲标准电动汽车很可能要求IEC 62196互操作。GB/T接口在物理上与IEC 62196车辆接口不兼容。
summary.zht: 多哥是法語、IEC對齊市場，任何面向國際來源乘用電動汽車的正式充電部署，均應預期採用IEC 62196接口：交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2，直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 CCS2。截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開來源確認多哥專門強制性的電動汽車接口法規，這反映出電動汽車市場仍處於極早期階段。但是，項目招標、捐助方資助交通項目、酒店、車隊以及進口歐洲標準電動汽車很可能要求IEC 62196互操作。GB/T接口在物理上與IEC 62196車輛接口不兼容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T AC connector differs from IEC Type 2 in connector gender, signaling, and contact arrangement; the GB/T DC connector differs geometrically from CCS2 and uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication rather than the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. A GB/T-only charger is therefore not plug-compatible with IEC 62196 vehicles that would be used in a Francophone / European-standard deployment in Togo.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口与IEC Type 2在接口性别、信号和触点排列上不同；GB/T直流接口与CCS2几何形状不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。因此，仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩无法与多哥法语/欧洲标准部署中可能使用的IEC 62196车辆插接兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口與IEC Type 2在接口性別、信號和觸點排列上不同；GB/T直流接口與CCS2幾何形狀不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。因此，僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁無法與多哥法語/歐洲標準部署中可能使用的IEC 62196車輛插接兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Conversion from China GB/T to Togo IEC-aligned deployment requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack, labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-parts plan. Adapters should not be treated as a compliant substitute for connector design. For 2/3-wheel charging, confirm whether the actual vehicle fleet uses IEC 62196, IEC 60309, domestic low-voltage plugs, battery-swap interfaces, or proprietary connectors before selecting equipment.
gap.zh: 从中国GB/T转换为多哥IEC对齐部署，需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、测试报告、温升证据和备件计划进行硬件重新设计。不应将转接器视为合规接口设计的替代方案。对于两/三轮车充电，应在选型前确认实际车队使用IEC 62196、IEC 60309、国内低压插头、换电接口还是专有接口。
gap.zht: 從中國GB/T轉換為多哥IEC對齊部署，需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據和備件計劃進行硬體重新設計。不應將轉接器視為合規接口設計的替代方案。對於兩/三輪車充電，應在選型前確認實際車隊使用IEC 62196、IEC 60309、國內低壓插頭、換電接口還是專有接口。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by project specification, tender, fleet, site owner, or imported vehicle interface; no standalone Togo EV connector regulation confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets. Confirm the actual vehicle fleet and project connector requirement before quoting, labelling, or shipping to Togo.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口。在向多哥报价、贴标或发货前，应确认实际车辆构成和项目接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口。在向多哥報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認實際車輛構成和項目接口要求。
